title: SDIFFSTORE
description: Stores the difference of multiple sets in a key.
complexity: O(N) where N is the total number of elements in all given sets.

returns.description: The number of elements in the resulting set

jedis.signature: long sdiffstore(final byte[] dstkey, final byte[]... keys)

returns.description: The number of elements in the resulting set

nredisstack_async.signature: SetCombineAndStore(SetOperation operation, RedisKey destination, RedisKey[] keys, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.description: destination key
params.name: destination

params.description: keys pointing to sets to subtract
params.name: *keys

returns.description: number of elements in the resulting set

content:
This command is equal to [`SDIFF`](), but instead of returning the resulting set, it is stored in `destination`. If `destination` already exists, it is overwritten. ## Examples {{% redis-cli %}} SADD key1 "a" SADD key1 "b" SADD key1 "c" SADD key2 "c" SADD key2 "d" SADD key2 "e" SDIFFSTORE key key1 key2 SMEMBERS key {{% /redis-cli %}} ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information {{< multitabs id="sdiffstore-return-info" tab1="RESP2" tab2="RESP3" >}} [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of elements in the resulting set. -tab-sep- [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of elements in the resulting set. {{< /multitabs >}}
example:
SADD key1 "a"
SADD key1 "b"
SADD key1 "c"
SADD key2 "c"
SADD key2 "d"
SADD key2 "e"
SDIFFSTORE key key1 key2
SMEMBERS key
intro:
This command is equal to [`SDIFF`](), but instead of returning the resulting set, it
is stored in `destination`.

If `destination` already exists, it is overwritten.
notes: This command's behavior varies in clustered Redis environments. See the [multi-key operations]() page for more information.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
This command is equal to [`SDIFF`](), but instead of returning the resulting set, it
is stored in `destination`.

If `destination` already exists, it is overwritten.

sections.title: Examples
sections.content:
{{% redis-cli %}}
SADD key1 "a"
SADD key1 "b"
SADD key1 "c"
SADD key2 "c"
SADD key2 "d"
SADD key2 "e"
SDIFFSTORE key key1 key2
SMEMBERS key
{{% /redis-cli %}}

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility
sections.content:
| Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | |
